# iNNv0

> AI Agent Skills ecosystem for OpenCode. Modular skills that power AI agents with specialized capabilities: model evaluation, skills management, document transformation, and web design.

Generator: https://skills.innv0.com/innv0-web-design-guide

## Pages

- [Home](https://skills.innv0.com/web/index.md): iNNv0 skills ecosystem landing page with skill cards, architecture overview, and installation instructions
- [Documentation](https://skills.innv0.com/documentation/README.md): Full documentation for all skills including Model Router, Skills Manager, traNNsform, and Web Design Guide
- [Model Router](https://skills.innv0.com/documentation/skills/opencode-model-router.md): Evaluates AI model suitability for each task across 4 task scales
- [Skills Manager](https://skills.innv0.com/documentation/skills/skills-manager.md): Meta-skill managing all repository skills lifecycle
- [traNNsform](https://skills.innv0.com/documentation/skills/trannsform.md): Document ingestion and transformation pipeline from PDF/DOCX to Markdown
- [Web Design Guide](https://skills.innv0.com/documentation/skills/web-design-guide.md): Light-mode design system with Morado Nazareno palette and 8px grid
